name: How long do I have to report my workplace slip and fall in Salt Lake City?
description: 180 days in Utah, but report right away.[1]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to report my workplace slip and fall in Salt Lake City?

acceptedAnswer.text: 180 days in Utah, but report right away.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **You have 180 days in Utah to report a workplace injury, but do it immediately to avoid issues.** Failure disqualifies benefits; employers must report to insurer in 7 days.[1][3] Key factors: Document details; physician submits Form 123 in 7 days; delays complicate proof. Notify supervisor/HR promptly, get treated, keep records. Sooner reporting strengthens your case significantly.
